problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
hypothesis: Liquid crystal elastomer actuation may resolve How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
